description_long: This is a Super Nintendo Entertainment System (SNES) controller, characterized by its rounded rectangular shape and ergonomic design. The front face features a gray D-pad on the left, two elongated oval buttons labeled 'SELECT' and 'START' in the center, and four colored action buttons (yellow, blue, green, and red) arranged in a diamond pattern on the right, labeled X, Y, B, and A. The top surface is marked with the 'Super Nintendo' logo and branding. The back is plain with several small screw holes and a molded label area, indicating assembly details. The controller is made primarily of hard plastic with rubberized button surfaces for tactile feedback. Its compact size and lightweight construction make it easy to hold and operate for extended periods.
description: A classic Super Nintendo controller with a gray body, colored buttons, and ergonomic design for handheld gaming. Features a D-pad, four action buttons, and two central control buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the D-pad, colored action buttons, 'SELECT' and 'START' buttons, and Super Nintendo branding.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the controller's slim, flat form factor and the slight protrusion of the buttons.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back with screw holes and a molded label area, no interactive elements visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the thinness and the slight elevation of the button area.
